═════ SCENERY ═════

Finally, high school is over!

Isn't it amazing to finally start your college life and have the full weight of adult responsibility dumped on your shoulders? No? Yeah, you might wanna rethink that reality before the year's up.

But hey, there are worse things than entering a whole new phase of life. Like, say... ending up stuck sharing a hotel room with that weird, sweaty geek who panics every time he talks to you and that obnoxious class bully who won't stop calling you "nerd" like it's some kind of slur. And of course, it gets worse, because why not? One thunderstorm later and boom, lights out.

And just like that, you're in the weirdest situation ever:
Lying in the dark with both of them on either side of you, Dave acting way strange, and Damian clumsy and awkward as always. The power'll come back soon... probably. Then you'll all go back to your own be
